status: constant-time discipline inventory only; current code is toy/reference scaffolding; no security claim
threat_model: local timing/cache observer of encapsulation or decapsulation; public parameters and public samples are visible; Lagrangian membership, selected secret state, decoder paths, message bits, and noise bits are secret until explicitly serialized for KAT diagnostics
scope: impl/polar_validation SC/SCL decoder used by the toy KAT rail

inventory.issue: secret-dependent membership lookup through the experimental Lagrangian container
inventory.required_action: replace set-style membership with a fixed-layout bit-sliced symplectic representation and mask-based lookup

inventory.surface: public-sample selection and toy divergent diagnostic selector
inventory.issue: diagnostic selector depends on the wrong secret and is intentionally outside the public LSN distribution
inventory.required_action: replace with a non-degenerate public-selection rule before claiming any production KAT distribution

inventory.issue: polar SCL path pruning uses data-dependent metrics, sorting, branching, heap-like vector growth, and floating-point operations
inventory.required_action: replace with fixed-list, fixed-schedule, integer or masked metric updates and data-oblivious selection

inventory.issue: XorShift/LCG randomness and toy hash lanes are deterministic test scaffolding, not production cryptographic primitives
inventory.required_action: replace with an approved DRBG/KDF and define serialization, domain separation, and failure handling

inventory.issue: KATs intentionally serialize secrets, public samples, labels, selected indices, and wrong-secret controls
inventory.required_action: keep KAT serialization outside production APIs and gate it behind explicit test-only tooling
